Container.Name: Slopsmith
Container.Overview:
A self-contained web application for browsing, playing, and practicing Rocksmith 2014 Custom DLC (CDLC). Runs entirely in Docker — no local dependencies required.
DISCLAIMER: This is an unofficial, community-provided Docker image. The application is actively developed, but major architecture changes may require updating paths or settings.
Container.Description: A self-contained web application for browsing, playing, and practicing Rocksmith 2014 Custom DLC (CDLC). Runs entirely in Docker — no local dependencies required.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: The port for Slopsmith Web UI (defaulted to 7000 to avoid browser blocked-port list)

Config.Name: DLC Directory
Config.Description: Where your Rocksmith 2014 CDLC is stored (Read-only recommended).

Config.Name: Appdata Directory
Config.Description: Location for config DB, caches (art, audio, sloppak), and persistent pip packages.

Config.Name: Plugins Directory
Config.Description: Optional: Set the path to scan for user-installed custom plugins. If set to /config/plugins, you can place custom plugins directly into the plugins/ subfolder of your appdata share.

Config.Name: Scan Max Workers
Config.Description: Optional: Restricts the maximum number of concurrent files being scanned at startup. Useful to cap CPU usage during library sync on lower-end servers.

Config.Name: Log Level
Config.Description: Uvicorn / Slopsmith logging level (DEBUG | INFO | WARNING | ERROR).

Config.Name: Log File Location
Config.Description: Optional: Persistent log file location to write logging output directly to your appdata directory for easier troubleshooting.

Config.Name: DLC_DIR Env
Config.Description: Internal application environment variable for DLC dir

Config.Name: CONFIG_DIR Env
Config.Description: Internal application environment variable for appdata config
